name: Karen Katphish
description:
The Cat mother from SMG4's cast of characters. I always really liked Karen, and her lore's been getting more interesting as of late. There's so few of her, I figured it's safe to submit my own take on her. Anyway, see if you can bring a smile to her face. Have fun!

Artist is North Fighter

Updated to reflect recent more on her.
creator: Grimj
